EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Process {subject.process.name} triggered a connection from host {src.host} to port {dst.port} of host {dst.host} which is usually used by Virtual Network Computing (VNC) services on host {event_src.host}

Process {object.process.name} triggered a connection from host {src.host} to port {dst.port} of host {dst.host} which is usually used by Virtual Network Computing (VNC) services on host {event_src.host}
